pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 17 code, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the annotation API dependency from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 21 (and modern Jakarta EE) uses the jakarta.* namespace; the javax.annotation-api artifact is deprecated/removed in newer ecosystems, leading to potential runtime linkage errors or deprecation warnings in a Jakarta EE context.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy com.sun.xml.bind jaxb-impl dependency with the modern org.glassfish.jaxb jaxb-runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: The com.sun.xml.bind artifacts are no longer maintained or available in standard repositories for modern JDKs; using the GlassFish group ensures compatibility with Java 21 and modern JAXB implementations.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced in Java 21.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Java 21 enables stricter checks for serialization fields; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata handling in modern JDKs.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ if the class implements Serializable.
Compilation error: cannot find symbol @Serial without the import.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add import for the new @Serial annotation introduced in Java 14 to support serializable fields.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available in Java 17; this import is required for the subsequent annotation usage in Java 21.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization requirements.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata handling in newer JDKs.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation to support serial version UID annotation.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is used in the class but was not imported, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Add import for the new java.io.Serial annotation introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available in Java 17 without the import, causing a compile error if used.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization fields in modern Java.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/view.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compilation error.
